events: You know, the one doing all the song code?
We've hope you've enjoyed V1 of the mod.
Please check the credits as the whole team is so talented and deserve as much praise as they can get.
Also make sure to stick around, as we've got a whole lot more coming real soon!
Anyway, I'll hand it back to Kreek now.
"I need him to, like, hurry up."
"I wonder why shutting a wooden door..."
"I don't think that's how that works?"
"Oh. My. God, you gotta be kidd-"
"Oh. My. God, you gotta be kiddin'"
"Oh. My. God, you gotta be kiddin' me..."
